title: Scanner: IVK note decryption and plaintext storage
description: The compact-block scanner uses NullDecryptor, meaning it never finds incoming notes. Without note detection, spendable_notes() is always empty and send_payment always fails with NoSpendableNotes. This issue implements a real SaplingIvkDecryptor that: (1) accepts a DiversifiableFullViewingKey, (2) implements NoteDecryptor using sapling::note_encryption::try_sapling_compact_note_decryption, (3) extends the Note struct or adds a new method to WalletStore to persist plaintext columns (note_diversifier, note_pk_d, note_rseed, rseed_after_zip212). Without this, the testnet E2E payment test (nie-3no) cannot work because Alice's wallet will never have spendable notes even after scanning.
